data.title: Avangrid Convenes Active Innovators and Leading Energy Partners
data.description: A recent event in Boston marked Avangrid's ninth annual Innovation Forum, aimed at speeding up solutions to key challenges in the energy sector. The forum gathered industry experts and innovators to address pressing issues. The event highlighted the importance of collaboration and innovation in tackling growing challenges in the energy industry.
Brent Crude futures settle at $71.57/bbl, down $1.38, 1.89%.

data.title: American Bitcoin, backed by Trump, hits new low price before a 1-for-15 reverse stock split tomorrow.
data.description: On Wednesday, the Bitcoin mining company American Bitcoin experienced a significant drop in its stock price. This decline occurred just a day before the company carried out a reverse stock split of 1-for-15.

data.title: Associated Bank's AI Academy returns with expanded focus on AI, financial literacy and career readiness
data.description: Associated Banc-Corp (ASB), disclosed the initiation of the second year of its AI Academy program in Milwaukee on July 1, 2026. The program is designed to assist students in developing crucial technology, financial, and workforce skills through self-paced learning. This initiative aims to provide learners with the necessary tools to thrive in the ever-evolving job market. The academy offers a flexible curriculum to accommodate diverse learning styles.

data.title: K2 Space Opens Engineering Office in Seattle Region
data.description: In the latest development, a startup called K2 Space, specializing in the creation of large, high-power satellites, has revealed its plans to open a new expansion office in the greater Seattle area. This move comes as the company aims to bolster its operations in the Pacific Northwest region. The expansion is set to enhance the support provided for the development of robust and high-capacity satellites.

data.title: Waste Pro USA, Inc. Announces Closing of $150.0 Million Florida Development Finance Corporation Solid Waste Disposal Revenue Bonds (Waste Pro USA, Inc. Project), Series 2026
data.description: In Longwood, Florida, on July 1, 2026, Waste Pro USA, Inc. revealed the finalization of a transaction involving the sale of $150 million in Florida Development Finance. Waste Pro is a privately-owned company that operates regionally, offering services related to the collection, transfer, recycling, and disposal of non-hazardous waste.
NBPE to buy back shares with a transaction announcement. #news #finance

data.title: Micron to donate $250 million to Trump accounts for kids' investment, as announced by President, building opportunities.
data.description: President Trump announced that a prominent American chip maker would be contributing a substantial amount to a unique investment account established by the administration for children.

data.title: Introducing ExploreK12: Unlocking Learning for Every Student in the Critical Subjects of Literacy, Math, and Science
data.description: A recent announcement revealed that ExploreLearning | Learning A‑Z has rebranded as ExploreK12 to signify the integration of its services for educators in literacy, math, and science. The new name emphasizes the organization's commitment to assisting educators in providing practical, effective, and enjoyable learning experiences for students. This change reflects a focus on supporting teachers in delivering quality education.
Fed's Chair Warsh said to pick Bessent staffer Samantha Schwab to serve as an adviser.

data.title: Tropical Smoothie Cafe® Celebrates the Fourth of July with a 'Smoothie Dog' Eating Contest Featuring Loco Beach Coconuts Players
data.description: A frozen dessert inspired by the popular Bahama Mama™ Smoothie is adding a tropical touch to a classic American summer tradition. On the Fourth of July alone, 150 million hot dogs are consumed in the U.S. This year, Tropical Smoothie Cafe is introducing a new frozen treat...

data.title: In HelloNation, Personal Injury Expert Missy Wigginton Examines Mississippi Truck Accident Liability Laws and Case Complexity
data.description: In Mississippi, truck accident cases are known for their legal intricacies, involving multiple parties, stringent regulations, and extensive investigations. This complexity stems from the unique dynamics of these incidents, requiring a thorough examination beyond typical vehicle claims. Recently in Columbus, on July 1, 2026, an article highlighted by HelloNation delves into this issue, shedding light on the challenges and considerations involved. The comprehensive analysis explores why these cases necessitate specialized legal attention and the importance of addressing various components to ensure appropriate resolutions.
KNDS TO RESUME IPO PROCESS WHEN CAPITAL MARKETS CONDITIONS ARE FAVOURABLE; HAS COMPLETED SUBSTANTIALLY ALL REQUIRED PREPARATION PHASES AND ENGAGED EXTENSIVELY WITH INVESTORS
MEXICO SAID IT IS WORKING WITH THE U.S. TO ADDRESS CONCERNS OVER FOREIGN DEPENDENCE AND HAS PROPOSED REDUCING SECTION 232 STEEL AND ALUMINUM TARIFFS THROUGH REGIONAL COORDINATION.

MEXICO SAID IT DISAGREES WITH U.S. POLICIES ON STEEL AND ALUMINUM TARIFFS, THE EXCLUSION OF REGIONAL AUTO PARTS FROM TARIFF CALCULATIONS, AND AGRICULTURAL SEASONALITY RULES, WHILE DESCRIBING AUTO RULES OF ORIGIN AS AMONG THE WORLD'S MOST COMPLEX.

data.title: BitMine, Sharplink, and Joe Lubin launch nonprofit Ethereum Institutional to boost Wall Street involvement with on-chain infrastructure.
data.description: Institutional Ethereum is set to act as a hub for financial institutions looking to deepen their engagement with on-chain infrastructure. The platform will function as a centralized point of contact, catering specifically to the needs of these institutions as they navigate the world of blockchain technology and decentralized finance (DeFi). By offering tailored services and support, Institutional Ethereum aims to facilitate the seamless integration of financial institutions into the rapidly evolving landscape of Ethereum and DeFi.

data.title: Accelerant Announces Enhanced Lloyd’s Partnership with the Launch of the ARX Consortium
data.description: Accelerant, a data-focused risk exchange platform listed on the NYSE as ARX, revealed a strengthened alliance with Lloyd’s of London in Atlanta. The creation of the ARX Consortium in collaboration with seven renowned Lloyd’s syndicates has allowed Accelerant Risk Exchange to develop a versatile network for a varied and sizable specialty risk collection. This initiative utilizes Accelerant's premium flow capabilities, combining them with Lloyd's reputation to establish a formidable platform.

data.title: Data Nubank: Nubank Leads as Brazilians' Primary Financial Institution and Has Already Banked 31.5 Million People
data.description: In the fourth quarter of 2025, Nubank, a leading digital financial services platform worldwide, emerged as the primary banking choice across Brazil, as indicated by research from NPS Prism by Bain & Company. Approximately 30% of the population in 17 states selected Nubank as their primary financial institution. This translates to millions of Brazilians from all regions entrusting Nubank to handle their income, transactions, and financial services.

data.title: Photonics Innovators Worldwide Invited to Compete for SPIE Prism Awards
data.description: BELLINGHAM, Washington - SPIE, the global society for optics and photonics, is welcoming applications from the optics and photonics community for the latest SPIE Prism Awards. These awards aim to acknowledge exceptional new products that are creating a buzz in the market. The winners will be revealed at the prestigious award ceremony on February 3, 2027, during SPIE Photonics West in San Francisco, California. Known as the "Oscars of Photonics," these awards offer recognition to scientists and engineers in the optics and photonics field.

data.title: Group 1 GMC Coastal Bend Celebrates One Year Under the Group 1 Name
data.description: Group 1 Automotive, Inc., a Houston-based automotive retailer, is celebrating the first anniversary of the former Beck & Masten Buick GMC Coastal Bend location in Robstown, Corpus Christi, and Coastal Bend. The location, now known as Group 1 GMC Coastal Bend, has been serving drivers in the area since July 1, 2026. This milestone marks a successful year of operation for the dealership under its new ownership. Group 1 Automotive continues to expand its presence in the automotive market, offering quality services and vehicles to customers in the region.
